footer.tagline: Engineering secure foundations for the next generation of digital infrastructure.
footer.description: Architecting high-performance digital infrastructure and regulatory-compliant ecosystems for the next generation of global innovators.

cta.description: Join the ranks of innovative companies building their digital future with EreborHub. Our experts are ready to turn your vision into a landmark product.

features.description: From idea to production, we bring deep technical expertise, transparent communication, and a commitment to excellence that sets us apart.

items.title: Speed to Market
items.description: Agile processes and experienced teams ensure your product ships fast without sacrificing quality or security.

items.title: Security First
items.description: Every system we build follows best-in-class security practices — from API design to infrastructure hardening.

items.title: Scalable Architecture
items.description: We design systems that grow with you — microservices, event-driven backends, and cloud-native infrastructure.

items.title: Long-term Partnership
items.description: We don't just hand off code. We stay involved through launch, scaling, and ongoing product evolution.

contact_form.success_description: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

hero.description: Four core service areas covering the full spectrum of modern technology needs — from high-scale software to global identity networks.
From robust infrastructures to cutting-edge platforms. Each project demonstrates our ability to transform complexity into elegant, high-performance solutions.
Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within one business day with a thoughtful response.

intro.title_highlight: We'd love to hear from you.
intro.description: Whether you need a custom web platform, a compliance system, or cloud infrastructure — our team is here to help you build it right.

form_section.title: Tell us about your project
form_section.description: Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.

hero.description: We engineer premium technological ecosystems and digital infrastructures that empower innovative businesses to scale with absolute confidence.

paragraphs: EreborHub was founded on the belief that Africa deserves world-class technology — built locally, with deep context and the highest engineering standards.
We work with startups, banks, NGOs, and enterprises across the continent — and beyond — to build software that matters.
From our offices in Kinshasa, we serve clients across the DRC, Africa, Europe, and North America.

values.description: Four principles guide every decision we make — from architecture to communication.

items.title: Precision
items.description: We care deeply about the details. Every architecture decision, every line of code, every UX interaction — done with intention.

items.title: Transparency
items.description: No black boxes. We keep clients informed at every stage, from planning to deployment, with clear communication.

items.title: Impact
items.description: We build software that creates real, measurable value — measured in lives improved, businesses grown, and problems solved.

items.title: Reliability
items.description: Zero critical outages across our portfolio. We engineer for resilience — because your uptime is our reputation.

members.name: Stéphane N. Kalambayi

members.name: Benjamin K. Mukena

members.name: Christ Ilunga Menga
members.description: Orchestrates market expansion and operational excellence, bridging the gap between technical engineering and SaaS commercial growth.
